sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n109132" key="u(poskelismo/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑποσκελ-ισμός</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n109132.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">tripping up, supplanting,</tr_> ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0527.tlg029:11:3" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">11.3</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
